name: Audit Log
description: Append-only JSONL audit log for recording and retrieving operation history. Provides functions to log commands with optional arguments, results, and errors, and to read recent audit entries from disk.

functions.name: _audit_path
functions.description: Returns the Path to the audit log file (audit.jsonl) within the HISTORY_DIR.
preconditions: HISTORY_DIR must be defined in ascend.config
postconditions: Returns a Path object pointing to HISTORY_DIR/audit.jsonl

functions.name: log_operation
functions.description: Appends an operation entry to the audit log with timestamp, command, and optional args, result, and error fields. Creates parent directories if they don't exist.

error_cases.name: permission_error
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to create directories or write to file

error_cases.name: os_error
error_cases.condition: Filesystem errors during directory creation or file write

error_cases.name: json_serialization_error
error_cases.condition: Objects in args cannot be serialized even with default=str

preconditions: command must be a non-empty string
postconditions: A JSONL entry is appended to audit.jsonl
Entry contains timestamp in ISO format (UTC)
Entry contains args field if args is provided and truthy
Entry contains result field if result is provided and truthy
Entry contains error field if error is provided and truthy
Parent directories are created if they don't exist
side_effects: Creates parent directories (HISTORY_DIR) if they don't exist
Appends a line to audit.jsonl file

structured_side_effects.description: Appends JSONL entry to audit log

functions.name: read_audit
functions.description: Reads and returns the last N entries from the audit log. Returns empty list if the audit file doesn't exist. Parses each line as JSON and filters out empty lines.

inputs.name: last_n
inputs.description: Number of recent entries to return

error_cases.name: permission_error
error_cases.condition: Insufficient permissions to read the audit file

error_cases.name: json_decode_error
error_cases.condition: Malformed JSON in audit log line

preconditions: last_n should be a non-negative integer
postconditions: Returns a list of at most last_n dictionaries
Returns empty list if audit.jsonl doesn't exist
Each dictionary represents a parsed JSONL entry
Returns the last last_n entries in order

invariants: Audit log is append-only (never modified or deleted by this module)
Each audit entry contains a UTC ISO-formatted timestamp
Each audit entry contains a command field
Audit log file is located at HISTORY_DIR/audit.jsonl
Each line in audit.jsonl is a valid JSON object followed by newline

data_access.rationale: Module reads and writes audit log file on disk

side_effects.rationale: Appends operation records to persistent audit log
Reads historical audit entries from persistent log
Creates HISTORY_DIR if it doesn't exist

authority.rationale: This module owns the audit log file format and access patterns
